title: Bagels' Texture Tweaks
description: Personal tweaks to a bunch of textures.
body:
## Hi there! Welcome to Bagel's Texture Tweaks.
This pack is a compilation of some of my own personal tweaks to existing textures that I feel are outdated or uncanny, or just other textures that I like to use.

### Some tweaks you will find in this pack:
- Complete touch up of all the Tool textures.
- Overhaul of the Chest textures
- More pleasant Lantern models
- Cleaner Horse Armour textures
- Proper sprite for Wolf Armour
- New item sprites for Torches and Lanterns
- And many more!
  
Don't agree with any of the changes? Due to the nature of Resource Packs, you can go in and remove any changes you would like!

(Do not reupload the edited pack, however. I will be sad)
